ast.source: A simplified set of essential workflow statuses

ast.source: Status workflow for a digital garden setup.

ast.target: 转瞬即逝的想法；原始、未经处理的思绪

ast.source: Early development; ideas that have begun to take shape

ast.name: description
ast.source: Structured notes; clear, standalone ideas in my own words

ast.source: Mature knowledge; deep, developed, and connected ideas

ast.source: Big picture; collections of ideas working together
ast.target: 全局视角；协同工作的想法集合

ast.name: description
ast.target: 已归档；旧笔记或未使用的笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inspiration; unprocessed or lightly processed sources
ast.target: 灵感；未经处理或轻度处理的来源

ast.name: description
ast.source: Usable resources; processed sources that I have engaged with and learned from
ast.target: 可用资源；已处理、我已参与并从中学习的来源

ast.name: description
ast.source: Workflow for managing first iteration of note-taking, starting second iteration, reviewing, and completing
ast.target: 用于管理笔记记录第一轮迭代、开始第二轮迭代、审阅和完成的工作流

ast.name: description
ast.source: Note creation and initial addition of content
ast.target: 笔记创建和初始内容添加

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reviewing note and adding anything that might be missed
ast.target: 审阅笔记并添加可能遗漏的内容

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically apply this status to newly created notes.
ast.target: 自动将此状态应用于新创建的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow notes to have multiple statuses at the same time
ast.target: 允许笔记同时拥有多个状态

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose how the status frontmatter value is stored when multiple statuses are disabled. String format improves compatibility with plugins like TaskNotes.
ast.target: 当禁用多状态时，选择状态前置元数据值的存储方式。字符串格式提高了与 TaskNotes 等插件的兼容性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show a folder context menu option that also processes notes inside nested folders.
ast.target: 显示一个文件夹上下文菜单选项，该选项也会处理嵌套文件夹内的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: YAML frontmatter tag name for status (default: obsidian-note-status)
ast.target: 状态的 YAML 前置元数据标签名称（默认：obsidian-note-status）

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, statuses mapped to custom frontmatter keys are also written to the default status tag.
ast.target: 启用后，映射到自定义前置元数据键的状态也会写入默认状态标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disable dashboard and grouped view for vaults with more notes than this limit to improve performance. Set to 0 to disable this feature.
ast.target: 对于笔记数量超过此限制的保险库，禁用仪表板和分组视图以提高性能。设置为 0 可禁用此功能。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 所有状态的自定义颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Icons, frames, status bar, and toolbar styles.
ast.target: 图标、框架、状态栏和工具栏样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multi-status, strict mode, and overview popups.
ast.target: 多状态、严格模式和概览弹窗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Frontmatter keys, mappings, and tag prefix.
ast.target: 前置元数据键、映射和标签前缀。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Quick commands, experiments, and vault limits.
ast.target: 快速命令、实验和保险库限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically save and load selected plugin settings from a file in your vault.
ast.target: 自动从保险库中的文件保存和加载选定的插件设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the JSON file where settings will be stored (relative to vault root).
ast.target: 设置将存储的 JSON 文件路径（相对于保险库根目录）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Store non-Markdown status data in a vault file instead of the internal plugin folder.
ast.target: 将非 Markdown 状态数据存储在保险库文件中，而不是内部插件文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to the JSON file where non-Markdown statuses will be stored.
ast.target: 非 Markdown 状态将存储的 JSON 文件路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display a status icon in the status bar with the current note status.
ast.target: 在状态栏中显示一个状态图标，显示当前笔记状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically hide the status icon whenever the current note does not have a status.
ast.target: 当当前笔记没有状态时，自动隐藏状态图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show a popup listing statuses when hovering or interacting with the status icon.
ast.target: 当悬停或与状态图标交互时，显示一个列出状态的弹出窗口。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Match the file explorer visuals: accent stripe, solid fill, or dot marker.
ast.target: 匹配文件资源管理器的视觉效果：强调色条、实心填充或点标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pick what text should be shown in the status bar when a note does not have a status.
ast.target: 选择当笔记没有状态时，状态栏中应显示什么文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display the unknown status icon in the status bar next to the custom text.
ast.target: 在状态栏中自定义文本旁边显示未知状态图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display the custom text in the status bar whenever no status is set.
ast.target: 当未设置状态时，在状态栏中显示自定义文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add a button to the editor toolbar to change the note status.
ast.target: 在编辑器工具栏中添加一个按钮来更改笔记状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose where the status button should appear in the editor toolbar.
ast.target: 选择状态按钮在编辑器工具栏中的显示位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Control which editors should display the toolbar button.
ast.target: 控制哪些编辑器应显示工具栏按钮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display a status icon for each file inside the file explorer.
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中为每个文件显示一个状态图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose where the icon should be rendered next to the file name.
ast.target: 选择图标应渲染在文件名旁边的哪个位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Do not render a status icon in the explorer when a note status cannot be determined.
ast.target: 当笔记状态无法确定时，不要在资源管理器中渲染状态图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Apply the active status color to the filename text inside the file explorer.
ast.target: 将活动状态颜色应用于文件资源管理器内的文件名文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Append a compact colored dot next to the filename as an extra status indicator.
ast.target: 在文件名旁边附加一个紧凑的彩色点作为额外的状态指示器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adds a colored underline below the filename without changing the text color.
ast.target: 在文件名下方添加一条彩色下划线，而不改变文本颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose whether to display a frame around the status icon inside the file explorer.
ast.target: 选择是否在文件资源管理器内的状态图标周围显示边框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emoji or Lucide icon name displayed whenever a note does not have a status.
ast.target: 当笔记没有状态时显示的表情符号或 Lucide 图标名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hex color used for unknown statuses (e.g., #8b949e).
ast.target: 用于未知状态的十六进制颜色（例如，#8b949e）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Unlock beta views that are still under development.
ast.target: 解锁仍在开发中的测试版视图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show the ribbon shortcut to open the status dashboard view.
ast.target: 显示打开状态仪表板视图的快速访问栏快捷方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show the ribbon shortcut to open the grouped status view.
ast.target: 显示打开分组状态视图的快速访问栏快捷方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable predefined workflows or define your own statuses.
ast.target: 启用预定义的工作流程或定义您自己的状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose statuses with command palette shortcuts.
ast.target: 使用命令面板快捷方式选择状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Icon, popup, badge style/content, and no-status behavior.
ast.target: 图标、弹出窗口、徽章样式/内容以及无状态行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fallback icon and color when a note lacks status.
ast.target: 当笔记缺少状态时的备用图标和颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multi-status mode, tag key, mappings, and vault safeguards.
ast.target: 多状态模式、标签键、映射和保险库保护措施。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Opt into dashboard and grouped view previews.
ast.target: 选择加入仪表板和分组视图预览。

ast.target: 递归地将状态应用于子文件夹

ast.target: 显示状态概览弹出窗口

ast.target: 显示编辑器工具栏按钮

ast.target: 为以下情况显示工具栏按钮
